arts.ttl: Liverpool join Barcelona in race to sign Bundesliga defender
arts.sum: Barcelona are already looking to the free agent market, as they aim to improve Hansi Flick’s squad next summer. At this stage, one of their leading targets is Jonathan Tah, whose Bayer Leverkusen contract is due to expire at the end of the season. Tah has been on Barcelona’s radar for several months, and he […] The post Liverpool join Barcelona in race to sign Bundesliga defender appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona coach Xavi rumoured with a move into international management
arts.sum: Despite having previously spoken out about wanting to take a year out of management, it now looks as though former Barcelona manager Xavi may be having his head turned by…

arts.ttl: Official: 5 new faces in Barcelona’s squad to face Sevilla
arts.sum: Barcelona have on Sunday afternoon unveiled the club’s matchday squad to face Sevilla. And a whole host of fresh faces feature front and centre. Hansi Flick’s troops are primed to…

Hansi Flick clarifies Barcelona goalkeeping situation ahead of Bayern Munich and Real Madrid fixtures - Football España He reviewed the overall situation of the club, placing particular emphasis on yet another positive response from La Masia, with fabulous youngsters strengthening the football team, the ordinary profit achieved last season despite having to play at the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys, the reduction in the payroll without losing competitiveness, and the excitement surrounding the return to Spotify Camp Nou and the celebrations of the 125th anniversary.

DM: Marc Casado - While Gavi is expected back on the bench for this one, it's young Casado who will retain his place in the starting lineup. LM: Raphinha - The star of the show under Flick so far, Raphinha leads Barcelona for assists this season and is behind only a certain Polish star in the goal charts.

arts.ttl: Barcelona President Joan Laporta charged with alleged fraud for second time in two weeks
arts.sum: Recently, Barcelona president Joan Laporta, as well as his former partner Joan Oliver, were charged by a Barcelona magistrate for allegedly failing to return an investment of €4.7m to another investor. The pair are now facing trouble again. As reported by Relevo, the Court of Instruction number 21 of Barcelona has admitted a complaint filed […] The post Barcelona President Joan Laporta charged with alleged fraud for second time in two weeks appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Sevilla: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Sunday's visitors currently sit 12th in La Liga despite their upsurge before the international break, and they secured a huge victory over Real Betis in the Seville Derby last time out. La Liga leaders Barcelona are back in domestic action on Sunday night as they welcome a resurgent Sevilla to Catalonia.

arts.ttl: Man United dealt double transfer blow as Barcelona president confirms contract talks
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta confirms that the La Liga leaders are discussing new contracts with Frenkie de Jong, Ronald Araujo and Pedri.

arts.ttl: Predicted XIs Barcelona-Sevilla: Lamine Yamal to start despite injury scare
arts.sum: Barcelona were pegged back by Real Madrid on Saturday, thanks to Carlo Ancelotti’s side winning 2-1 at Celta Vigo. The Catalans will aim to re-establish their three-point lead at the top of La Liga when they take on Sevilla at the Estadi Olimpic.
